subcodes.first_line: Exalted is He Who hath ordained for the people of Bahá that which He ordained not for any in creation, verily they are the Daysprings of certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی الذی قدر لاهل البهاء ما لاقدره لاهل الانشاء الا انهم مطالع الایقان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
